root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Sleep, baby, my dearest... Hushabye, a-bye.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Quietly, the bright moon is looking at you in the cradle.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Quietly, the bright moon is looking at you in the cradle.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Quietly, the bright moon is looking at you in the cradle.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I will tell you a story, sing you a song.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I will tell you a story, sing you a song.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I will tell you a story, sing you a song.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You dream a dream, closing your eyes. Hushabye, a-bye.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You dream a dream, closing your eyes. Hushabye, a-bye.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You dream a dream, closing your eyes. Hushabye, a-bye.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way that I'm going to fall asleep because you're patting me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way that I'm going to fall asleep because you're patting me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way that I'm going to fall asleep because you're patting me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, report.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, report.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, report.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mission... complete.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mission... complete.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Biosignals... not found.
